title: olearia fluvialis
intro: Olearia fluvialis, also known as the swamp daisy or river daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for wound healing and skin infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Olearia fluvialis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
